wares.name: Mosaic
wares.description: Tiny art, big feelings. A pixel editor with drawing tools, fills, undo/redo, and PNG export when you're ready to share your 32x32 masterpiece.
wares.author: Regionally Famous

wares.name: Ledger
wares.description: Get paid. Track clients, generate polished invoices, and log payments without ever leaving the WordPress dashboard.
wares.author: Regionally Famous

wares.name: Flow
wares.description: Stop doomscrolling, start doing. A Pomodoro timer with ambient soundscapes, per-session task lists, and a heatmap so you can see exactly which days you crushed it.
wares.author: Regionally Famous

wares.name: Board
wares.description: Cards. Columns. Drag. Drop. Done. A no-nonsense project board that shows you exactly what's happening, what's stuck, and what you can finally move to "done."
wares.author: Regionally Famous

wares.name: Swatch
wares.description: Pick colors like you mean it. Full HSL editing, harmony rules, WCAG contrast checks, and one-click export to CSS, Tailwind, or SVG.
wares.author: Regionally Famous

wares.name: Sine
wares.description: A full synthesizer living inside your WordPress admin. Four waveforms, ADSR envelope, a resonant filter, and a step sequencer — all running on pure Web Audio.
wares.author: Regionally Famous
